revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/88329752#サポート対象外になったブラウザとの互換性テンプレートの廃止作業|Bot作業依頼]]: セミコロン1つに変更する - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]] (insource:/; *;/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Navbox with columns |name = miyagi-tv tpl |navbar = plain |state = collapsed |style = border-collapse:separate; width:100%; float:center; margin:0 0 0em 0em; padding:0; border-radius: 1px 1px 1px 1px; |titlestyle = border-radius: 1px 1px 0px 0px; |title =[[File:Emblem of Miyagi Prefecture.svg|20px]][[宮城県]]のテレビ放送関連テンプレート |padding = 0em |listclass = hlist hlist-pipe |liststyle=text-align:center |liststate = collapsed |col1width=50em |col1 = {{Template:東北放送アナウンサー|state=collapsed}}{{Template:東日本放送アナウンサー|state=collapsed}} |col2width=50em |col2 = {{Template:ミヤギテレビアナウンサー|state=collapsed}}{{Template:仙台放送アナウンサー|state=collapsed}} |list1 = {{Template:めざましテレビ宮城担当リポーター|state=collapsed}} |list2 = {{宮城県内夕方ローカルニュース|state=collapsed}} }}<noinclude><!-- NOTE: A template MUST support all of the parameters marked with a cross in Template:Navbox/doc in order to be Navbox suite compliant. In particular, the name, state, border, and navbar parameters are especially important. --> {{citation needed|みやきけんのてれひ}} [[Category:日本のテレビ放送関連テンプレート]] [[Category:宮城県のテンプレート]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox with columns |name = miyagi-tv tpl |navbar = plain |state = collapsed |style = border-collapse:separate; width:100%; float:center; margin:0 0 0em 0em; padding:0; border-radius: 1px 1px 1px 1px; |titlestyle = border-radius: 1px 1px 0px 0px; |title =[[File:Emblem of Miyagi Prefecture.svg|20px]][[宮城県]]のテレビ放送関連テンプレート |padding = 0em |listclass = hlist hlist-pipe |liststyle=text-align:center |liststate = collapsed |col1width=50em |col1 = {{Template:東北放送アナウンサー|state=collapsed}}{{Template:東日本放送アナウンサー|state=collapsed}} |col2width=50em |col2 = {{Template:ミヤギテレビアナウンサー|state=collapsed}}{{Template:仙台放送アナウンサー|state=collapsed}} |list1 = {{Template:めざましテレビ宮城担当リポーター|state=collapsed}} |list2 = {{宮城県内夕方ローカルニュース|state=collapsed}} }}<noinclude><!-- NOTE: A template MUST support all of the parameters marked with a cross in Template:Navbox/doc in order to be Navbox suite compliant. In particular, the name, state, border, and navbar parameters are especially important. --> {{citation needed|みやきけんのてれひ}} [[Category:日本のテレビ放送関連テンプレート]] [[Category:宮城県のテンプレート]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
